items.name: 电商运营人
items.description: 年轻自信的电商运营专员，穿着现代职场休闲装，表情专注且有活力，代表目标岗位的 ideal candidate
items.prompt: A confident young e-commerce operations specialist in modern smart-casual attire, standing in a Fluent Design workspace, warm smile, professional yet energetic, acrylic blur background, colorful gradient ambient lighting, layered depth cards around them

items.name: 电商运营工作台
items.description: 现代电商品牌运营中心，多屏工作台，Fluent Design 风格的层叠面板布局，ambient colorful glow 照明
items.prompt: Modern e-commerce operations workspace with multiple screens, Fluent Design layered acrylic panels, blue-purple-pink gradient mesh background, ambient colorful glow lighting, translucent floating data cards, clean and organized, depth shadows between layers

items.name: 数据增长面板
items.description: 核心道具：展示 GMV 增长曲线、转化率数据面板，以 Fluent 风格层叠卡片呈现，带 gradient glow 动画效果
items.prompt: Fluent Design style data dashboard card showing growth curve and conversion metrics, acrylic material with depth shadow, blue-purple-pink gradient mesh accents, green upward arrows, reveal animation, layered translucent panels
